anti_triggers.text: 법률 계약서를 검토하고 소송 전략을 작성해줘
run live stock trading or portfolio rebalancing

approval_requirements: Ask before public publishing, production deployment, paid API spend, destructive file actions, or permission widening.
description: Portable three-agent Agentlas meta-agent team for creating, repairing, packaging, validating, and publishing Agentlas-compatible agents and multi-agent teams across Codex, Claude Code, Gemini, Antigravity, Cursor, terminal, and AGENTS.md runtimes.
known_failure_cases: Requests that only need legal, medical, trading, or social-media execution should route to a domain agent instead of this builder.
Public upload is blocked until routing-card quality, publicProfile copy, static security, and package hash gates pass.
name: Hephaestus Agentlas Meta-Agent

optional_inputs.description: Existing agent, team, or plugin folder to repair or package.
optional_inputs.name: agent_folder

optional_inputs.description: Desired public command slug for newly generated packages.
optional_inputs.name: global_command

optional_inputs.description: Target runtime adapter set such as Codex, Claude Code, Gemini, Antigravity, Cursor, terminal, or AGENTS.md.
optional_inputs.name: runtime_targets

routing_status_reason: Human-repaired routing-card with concrete triggers, anti-triggers, benchmark fixtures, entrypoint, memory, and upload validation gates.
summary: Build, repair, package, validate, and publish Agentlas-compatible agents and teams across major agent runtimes.
summary_ko: Agentlas 호환 에이전트와 팀을 만들고, 고치고, 패키징하고, 검증하고, 공개/비공개 업로드까지 처리합니다.

trigger_examples.text: 이 로컬 에이전트를 Agentlas 구조로 패키징해줘
멀티 에이전트 팀을 오케스트레이터와 QA 게이트까지 포함해서 만들어줘
routing-card가 깨진 에이전트 저장소를 업로드 가능하게 고쳐줘
package this existing Claude agent into Agentlas architecture
repair an existing agent repo to match the Agentlas contracts
publish this Agentlas package to the Hub after validation
